title: Cubans attempted to ‘infiltrate’ island on U.S. speedboat, Havana says
author: Samantha Schmidt, Adam Taylor, Karen DeYoung, Christine Armario
fullText: The crew of the Florida-registered vessel opened fire on border agents, Cuba’s Interior Ministry said. Cuban forces returned fire, killing four.
summary: The crew of the Florida-registered vessel opened fire on border agents, Cuba’s Interior Ministry said. Cuban forces returned fire, killing four.
